build_check.description: Headless launch exits 0 without fatal errors; this 0/1 gate multiplies the rest.

requirements.description: The player moves a wizard, chooses a card, spends visible mana, and casts a legal line/cone/area spell. Scripted card showcases or shape-only targeting mockups cap at 0.5.

At least two spells change terrain mechanically, such as fire burning forest, ice freezing water, or lightning chaining through metal. Text descriptions or color swaps without tactical effect score 0.
Wizard position changes spell origin, range, direction, line of sight, or area coverage, and the opponent moves/casts under similar constraints. Static or mostly scripted opponents cap at 0.5.
Terrain destruction or transformation changes later movement, blocking, cover, chaining, or targeting. Cosmetic flashes or label-only terrain state score 0.
The loop connects title, deck selection, turn duel, HP defeat, result screen, and rematch/menu navigation. Static showcase flow or missing victory/defeat paths cap at 0.5.
At least five spells differ by element, cost, pattern, effect, and tactical role. Name/color/damage-only card differences cap at 0.5.
At least four terrain types are visually distinct and mechanically different. Text overlays, color-only squares, or same-behavior terrain cap at 0.5.
The AI spends mana, moves, casts, targets, and reacts to terrain or danger. Narrated AI or random/static behavior scores 0.
Deck-building lets the player choose from a larger collection, and progression unlocks usable cards. Static card lists without duel impact score 0.
At least two arena layouts create different movement, targeting, and spell-use decisions. Cosmetic layout changes or menu-only variants cap at 0.5.
HUD clearly shows both HP bars, mana, turn, spell hand, card costs, and selected card without overlap. Plain text/debug counters cap at 0.5.
The arena clearly shows terrain, wizards, legal movement, targeting shapes, and transformed/destroyed tiles. Flat grids/text-labeled cells cap at 0.5.
Movement, casting, mana/HP changes, terrain transformation, invalid casts, and victory/defeat produce visible feedback. Text messages or primitive flashes cap at 0.5.
The game has cohesive arcane-duel art direction across arena, cards, effects, HUD, menus, and results. Primitive or draw_text-heavy screens score 0.
Wizards and spell effects use authored sprites, particles, or illustrated/pixel-art forms. Rectangles, letters, icons, or basic colored shapes score 0.
Terrain and destruction states use textured authored arena art with readable material detail. Uniform colored squares or featureless grids score 0.
Cards, HUD, deck selection, and results use themed UI chrome, icons, fonts, and frames. Rectangle/text or default-control UI scores 0.
Movement, casting, impacts, terrain changes, damage reactions, turn transitions, and ambient magic use deliberate animation/effects. Static scenes or single-frame swaps score 0.
